name: Steamed Chicken with Chinese Vegetables
recipeIngredient: Whole chicken breast, boned and skinned
4 ounces Canned sliced water chestnuts, drained
1/4 pound Fresh snow peas, strings removed
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken into 1/2-inch cubes.
2. In a medium bowl, combine 3 tablespoons sherry and 1 tablespoon soy sauce.
3. Add chicken and marinate for at least 1 hour or overnight.
4. Pour enough water into a wok to come just below the steaming rack.
5. Bring water to a boil in the wok.
6. Place chicken on one side of a shallow baking dish.
7. Arrange mushrooms alongside the chicken and water chestnuts alongside the mushrooms.
8. Set the dish on the rack in the wok; cover and steam until chicken and vegetables are tender, about 20 minutes.
9. Place snow peas over the vegetables in the dish; steam until peas turn bright green, 2 to 3 minutes.
10. Meanwhile, combine remaining sherry and soy sauce with water, oyster sauce, cornstarch, and sesame oil in a medium saucepan over medium heat.
11. Cook and stir until thickened, about 5 minutes.
12. Serve chicken and vegetables over rice. Pass the sauce separately.
Bon Appetit LIGHT AND EASY SPECIAL
